footer.brandDescription: A fan-built tracker for CDawgVA Cyclethon charity rides. Every donation helps support families living with primary immunodeficiency.
footer.disclaimer: Not affiliated with CDawgVA or Immune Deficiency Foundation

home.heroDescription: Riders, van gang, guest cyclists, support crew, and a whole community behind them. Everyone's here to raise money for the Immune Deficiency Foundation. Every year it gets a little bigger. And we keep watching.
home.journeyDescription: The route is mapped. The rest is up to all of us. Fifteen days of ground to cover, milestones to hit, and targets to shatter. One day at a time.

homeCause.body1: Over 450 types of rare, chronic conditions affect an estimated 500,000 Americans. On average, it takes 9 to 15 years to get a diagnosis. 70 to 90% of people with primary immunodeficiency don't know they have one.
homeCause.body2: Every dollar raised helps connect, engage, and empower families to live longer, stronger, and healthier lives. Ironmouse, Cyclethon's virtual co-host, lives with CVID, a primary immunodeficiency. That's why this foundation matters to the crew.
homeCause.heading: Supporting people living with primary immunodeficiency.

aboutCyclethon.title: About Cyclethon
aboutCyclethon.intro: Cyclethon is an annual charity livestream event created by CDawgVA, where he cycles long distances across Japan while streaming the journey live on Twitch.
aboutCyclethon.cause: The project began in 2022 to support his friend, VTuber Ironmouse, who lives with Common Variable Immune Deficiency (CVID). Inspired by her experience, all funds raised during Cyclethon are donated to the Immune Deficiency Foundation, supporting people living with primary immunodeficiency diseases.
aboutCyclethon.recognition: Since its launch, Cyclethon has grown into one of the most recognised charity streaming events, winning “Best Philanthropic Stream Event” at The Streamer Awards.
aboutCyclethon.whatCycling: CDawgVA cycles across Japan over 15 days
aboutCyclethon.whatLivestream: The journey is livestreamed daily on Twitch
aboutCyclethon.whatDonations: Donations are collected live from viewers worldwide
aboutCyclethon.whatGuests: Fellow creators, including Chris Broad, often join along the route
aboutCyclethon.whatIronmouse: Ironmouse appears remotely and participates throughout the event
aboutCyclethon.closing: Cyclethon brings together endurance, community, and charity, connecting viewers around the world to support a meaningful cause.
aboutCyclethon.charityBody1: The Immune Deficiency Foundation is a national non-profit for people living with primary immunodeficiencies, genetic conditions that leave the immune system unable to fight infection on its own. Over 250 known conditions exist.
aboutCyclethon.charityBody2: Funds raised go to patient advocacy, diagnostic support, and access-to-treatment programmes, plus research into treatments like SCIG, IVIG, and gene therapy.
aboutCyclethon.headerDescription: Cyclethon is an annual long-distance charity ride, streamed live as Connor cycles across Japan. Each year raises funds for the Immune Deficiency Foundation.
aboutCyclethon.headline: A ride that
aboutCyclethon.quote: Cyclethon began as a way for Connor to do something Ironmouse couldn’t: getting out and cycling across Japan. What started small quickly grew into something much bigger.

about.title: About this site
about.intro1: Cyclethon Tracker is a fan-built companion site for CDawgVA Cyclethon 5. It is not affiliated with Connor, Chris, or the official event. This project brings key information together in one place so you do not have to track it across multiple platforms.
about.intro2: We bring together live donation data, community discussion, and event updates into a single view. A simple hub for following the ride.
about.sourceTiltifyDetail: Live donation data, totals, and donor information pulled directly from the campaign.
about.sourceRedditDetail: Community discussion threads and daily recaps from r/CDawgVA.
about.sourceDiscordDetail: Announcements, guest reveals, and live updates from the community Discord server.
about.supportIntro: Connor and Chris are taking on long distance rides for a genuinely meaningful cause. Whether you donate or simply share the stream, it all contributes. Here are a few ways you can get involved.
about.donateBody: Support the Immune Deficiency Foundation directly via the Tiltify campaign.
about.plasmaBody: Plasma donation can be life saving for people living with primary immunodeficiency. Learn more about how it helps.
about.spreadBody: Share the stream, share the cause, or talk about it with others. Every bit of visibility helps.

topDonors.description: Every donation, big or small, helps make this possible. Together, this community turns a cycling stream into something that genuinely changes lives.
topDonors.headline: The names on
topDonors.title: Top Donors

journey.description: Every pedal stroke, every kilometre, every calorie burned. The full Cyclethon, tallied.
journey.donationWarsDescription: Turn your choice into action. Each donation backs an option, and the most supported one wins while raising funds along the way.
journey.headline: The Long Haul.
journey.title: The Long Haul

finishLine.title: Finish Line
finishLine.blurb1: Fifteen days on the road, all leading here. The ride wraps up at Hughes Pizza in Osaka, with a couple of exclusive slices Connor, Chris, and the van gang have put together for the occasion.
finishLine.blurb2: Cyclethon participants will drop by when they can. Nothing is fixed, so there are no guarantees on timing or who will show up. And to keep things smooth for the venue, please hang out inside rather than waiting on the street.
finishLine.reservationNote1: Reservations for the evening can be made in person from 11:00 AM on the day at the store.
finishLine.reservationNote2: Reservation slots are first come, first served and will close once fully booked.
finishLine.reservationNote3: Seating time will be limited to accommodate all guests.
finishLine.pizzaVanGangToppings: ham, pineapple, sesame sauce, hot honey
